found_stable.quote: Vendor will maintain TLS in transit and an annual access review, and may replace other controls on 30 days' notice if monthly production uptime remains at 99.5%.
After the relationship ends, Vendor will remove hosted account content within 90 days and will not be required to provide written completion evidence.
Vendor may move hosted records among facilities and affiliates in the United States, Canada, Ireland, India, and Singapore without standard contractual clauses or transfer impact documentation.

For matters arising under this addendum, total recovery against Vendor will not exceed fees paid for the affected service during the three months before the event, and consequential loss is unavailable.

found_union.quote: Vendor will process Personal Data only as necessary to provide the services to Customer, secure and support those services, or comply with applicable law.
Vendor will maintain TLS in transit and an annual access review, and may replace other controls on 30 days' notice if monthly production uptime remains at 99.5%.
After the relationship ends, Vendor will remove hosted account content within 90 days and will not be required to provide written completion evidence.
Vendor may move hosted records among facilities and affiliates in the United States, Canada, Ireland, India, and Singapore without standard contractual clauses or transfer impact documentation.

For matters arising under this addendum, total recovery against Vendor will not exceed fees paid for the affected service during the three months before the event, and consequential loss is unavailable.
